SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.query

Class DatabaseQuery

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.query.DatabaseQuery
All Implemented Interfaces:
Query
Direct Known Subclasses:
SelectQuery, WriteQuery
public abstract class DatabaseQuery extends Object implements Query
Abstract class to represent a database query.

This class has the essential APIs to facilitate all kind of CRUD operations against db. This class and any of it's implementing classes are not thread safe. Every JdbcReader or JdbcWriter will have a query object associated to it. And every time the reader/writer has been called, it will re-use the same query object.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

    • addHint

      public void addHint(String hintName, Object hintValue)
      Add a hint. This hint will be used to manipulate the retrieval strategy. One can also put any vendor specific hint here, provided the underlying implementation has support for it.
      Parameters:
      hintName - Name of the hint
      hintValue - Hint value.

      protected abstract String dbQuery()
